overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a truck driving simulator, showing a driver navigating through a container port. The truck drives past stacked shipping containers, stops at an intersection, makes a left turn around large orange storage tanks, and continues through the industrial harbor area.

agents.ego_description: driving straight through the container port past stacked shipping containers on the right

entered.detail: stacked green metal shipping containers with white text markings
stacked yellow shipping containers behind the green ones
large blue port cranes visible in the distance against the sky
low industrial building with multiple loading bays in the background

segments.scene_description: The truck drives straight along an asphalt road through a container port. Green and yellow shipping containers are stacked on the right side, while large port cranes and terminal buildings are visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial intersection with large storage tanks

events.description: truck approaches and stops at the stop line marking painted on the asphalt
driver turns head and camera left to check for cross traffic before turning
truck begins left turn maneuver around the orange cylindrical tanks

agents.ego_description: stopping at the stop line, checking left for traffic, then executing a wide left turn around the storage tanks

entered.detail: large horizontal orange cylindrical storage tanks with white ends
white rectangular cargo trailers parked in rows

segments.scene_description: The truck approaches an intersection marked with a stop line and comes to a halt. The driver checks left for traffic, then executes a left turn around large orange cylindrical storage tanks. White box trailers become visible on the left as the turn progresses.

agents.ego_description: accelerating and driving straight through the port area past rows of parked white trailers

entered.detail: stacked red shipping containers with white text and logos

segments.scene_description: After completing the left turn, the truck drives straight along a wide asphalt road. White cargo trailers line the left side while red and green shipping containers are stacked on the right. The vehicle continues toward distant port buildings under clear skies.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective of a truck navigating a container port, transitioning from a straight industrial corridor to a wide harbor road. It begins by driving along an asphalt road flanked by stacks of green and yellow shipping containers, with massive port cranes and terminal buildings looming in the distance. As the truck approaches an intersection, it comes to a halt at a stop line before executing a left turn around a cluster of large orange cylindrical storage tanks. The scene then opens up as the turn completes, revealing white box trailers on the left and shifting the scenery to a wide road lined with red and green containers. Finally, the vehicle continues straight through the industrial landscape toward distant port buildings under a clear sky.
